---
title: "9/11 Street Conamings"
author: "Lukas Lopez-Jensen"
date: "2026-07-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(leaflet)
library(htmltools)
```

# Acquire complete data from the arcgis map
```{r}
intersection_url <- 
  "https://services6.arcgis.com/yG5s3afENB5iO9fj/arcgis/rest/services/survey123_84951e642e3a49998a9cfba407142ac5_results/FeatureServer/0/query"

street_url <- 
  "https://services6.arcgis.com/yG5s3afENB5iO9fj/arcgis/rest/services/survey123_da9c3d28841f484e8cd88f960513d183_results/FeatureServer/0/query"

download_arcgis <- function(url, geometry_type = c("street", "intersection"), batch_size = 1000) {
  geometry_type <- match.arg(geometry_type)
  offset <- 0
  features <- list()

  repeat {
    r <- GET(url, query = list(
        where = "1=1", outFields = "*", returnGeometry = TRUE,
        orderByFields = "objectid ASC", resultOffset = offset,
        resultRecordCount = batch_size,f = "json"
      ))
    x <- fromJSON(content(r, "text"), simplifyDataFrame = FALSE)
    n <- length(x$features)
    cat("Offset:", offset, " Returned:", n, "\n")

    if (n == 0)
      break

    features <- c(features, x$features)
    offset <- offset + n
  }

  cat("Total features downloaded:", length(features), "\n")

  # Attributes
  attributes <- map_dfr(features,
    ~{
      attrs <- .x$attributes
      attrs[map_lgl(attrs, is.null)] <- NA
      as_tibble(attrs)
    }
  )

  # Geometry
  if (geometry_type == "intersection") {
    geometry <- st_sfc(map(features, ~st_point(c(.x$geometry$x, .x$geometry$y))), crs = 4326)
    
  } else if (geometry_type == "street") {
    geometry <- st_sfc(map(
      features, function(f) {
      paths <- f$geometry$paths
      # Convert each path in the array into a coordinate matrix
      lines <- lapply(seq_len(dim(paths)[1]), function(i) {
        paths[i, , ]}
      )

      if (length(lines) == 1) {
        st_linestring(lines[[1]])
      } else {
        st_multilinestring(lines)
      }}),
    crs = 4326)
  }

  st_as_sf(bind_cols(attributes, geometry = geometry))
}

intersection_sf <- download_arcgis(intersection_url, geometry_type = "intersection")
street_sf <- download_arcgis(street_url, geometry_type = "street")

intersection_sf <- intersection_sf |> mutate(feature_type = "Intersection")
street_sf <- street_sf |> mutate(feature_type = "Street")

honorary_sf <- bind_rows(intersection_sf, street_sf)
```

# Clean and filter
```{r}
# Reformat dates & remove extra spaces
honorary_sf <- honorary_sf %>%
  mutate(
    creation_dt = as.POSIXct(CreationDate / 1000, origin = '1970-01-01', tz = 'UTC'),
    edit_dt = as.POSIXct(EditDate / 1000, origin = '1970-01-01', tz = 'UTC'),
    enactment_dt = as.POSIXct(enactment_date / 1000, origin = '1970-01-01', tz = 'UTC'),
    # Date only
    enactment_date = as.Date(enactment_dt),
    # Calendar year
    enactment_year = as.integer(format(enactment_date, '%Y'))
  ) %>%
  mutate(new_name = str_squish(new_name))

# Filter to post-9/11, drop duplicates in relevant columns
hits <- honorary_sf %>% filter(enactment_date >= as.Date("2001/09/11"))  %>%
  select(new_name, biographical_information, limits, borough, zip_code, enactment_year, present_name, category, introduced_by_council_members, geometry) %>%
  unique()

# Search for 9/11 keywords in bio
date <- hits %>%
  filter(str_detect(
    str_to_lower(biographical_information),
    '9/11|9-11|9.11|september 11'
  ))

keywords <- regex("world trade center|wtc|twin towers|ground zero", ignore_case = TRUE)
exclude <- regex("9/11|september 11|9-11|9.11", ignore_case = TRUE)
other_hits <- honorary_sf %>% filter(str_detect(biographical_information, keywords), !str_detect(biographical_information, exclude)) %>%
    select(new_name, biographical_information, limits, borough, zip_code, enactment_year, present_name, category, introduced_by_council_members, geometry) %>%
  unique()

final <- rbind(date, other_hits)

# Remove those with insufficient involvement
blacklist <- c("Anthony Varvaro Way", "Cono D’ Alto Way", "Lawrence “Larry” Morrish Way", "Jim McQuade Way", 
"Lucy and Lenny Cecere Way", "Don Lee Way", "Don B Lee Way", "Augie Ayala Jr. Way", "Kevin J. Walsh Way",
"Lance Cpl. Michael D. Glover USMC Way", "Firefighter Thomas C. Brick Way", "Thomas C. Brick Way",
"Monsignor James J. Dorney Way", "Detective Miosotis Familia Way", "Dan Doctoroff Way", 
"Deacon John A. Singler, II Street", "Reverend Dr. James C. Kelly Sr. Way", "Annie Beveridge Way",
"Max Bond Way", "Marc A. Haken Way", "Rab Wilkinson Way", "Bishop Landon E. Penn Way", 
"Marine Lance Corporal William Wayne White Street", "Brother Ralph Clifford Way", "Lori Allison Singer Avenue",
"Jodie Lane Place", "Private 2nd Class Brian Grant Street “Operation Iraqi Freedom”", "African Square",
"Stan Brooks Way", "Honorable Louis R. Jerome Way", "Franklin J. Havlicek Place", "Mary V. Lauro Way", 
"Stephen “Snapper” Knapp", "Bobby Bello Field", "Sgt. Mario Nelson Haitian Warrior", "John M. D’Amato Way", "Pfc. Hernando Rios Place", "Irwin B. Cohen Way", 'Andy "The Barber" Foxe Way', "Melvin “Mel” Doby Memorial Way", "Dennis M. Hogan Way", "Citizens of Mola di Bari Way", "Detective Raymond Abear Way")

final <- final %>% filter(!new_name %in% blacklist)
```

# Create New Map
```{r}
# Columns to include in popup
popup_cols <- setdiff(names(final), attr(final, "sf_column"))

# Pretty variable names
pretty_name <- function(x) {x |> str_replace_all("_", " ") |> str_to_title()}

# Build popup HTML
popup_html <- map_chr(seq_len(nrow(final)), function(i) {
  vals <- final[i, popup_cols] |> st_drop_geometry()
  vals_list <- vals[1, ] |> as.list()
  
  # Popup title
  title <- htmlEscape(vals_list$new_name)

  # Remove fields that will be displayed separately
  body_fields <- vals_list[!names(vals_list) %in% c("new_name", "biographical_information")]

  # Metadata fields
  rows <- map2_chr(
    pretty_name(names(body_fields)),
    body_fields,
    ~sprintf(
      "<div style='
          font-size:12px;
          line-height:1.35;
          margin-bottom:3px;'>
         
         <span style='font-weight:bold;'>%s:</span> %s

       </div>",
      htmlEscape(.x),
      htmlEscape(ifelse(is.null(.y) || is.na(.y), "", as.character(.y)))))

  # Biography section
  bio <- vals_list$biographical_information

  if (is.null(bio) || is.na(bio)) {
    bio_section <- ""
  } else {
    bio_section <- sprintf(
      "<hr style='margin:8px 0 5px 0;'>

       <div style='
           font-weight:bold;
           font-size:12px;
           margin-bottom:4px;'>
         Biographical Information
       </div>

       <div style='
           max-height:140px;
           overflow-y:auto;
           overflow-x:hidden;
           white-space:normal;
           font-size:12px;
           line-height:1.35;
           padding-right:4px;'>
         %s
       </div>",
      htmlEscape(bio))}

  paste0(
    "<div style='
        max-width:320px;
        max-height:300px;
        overflow-y:auto;
        overflow-x:hidden;
        padding-right:4px;'>",

      # Sticky title
      "<div style='
          position:sticky;
          top:0;
          background:white;
          z-index:100;
          padding-bottom:5px;
          margin-bottom:6px;
          border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;
          font-size:15px;
          font-weight:bold;'>",
        title,
      "</div>",
      paste(rows, collapse = ""),
      bio_section,
    "</div>"
  )
})

# Geometry indices
line_idx <- which(st_geometry_type(final) == "LINESTRING")
point_idx <- which(st_geometry_type(final) == "POINT")

map <- leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
  addPolylines(
    data = final[line_idx, ],
    popup = popup_html[line_idx],
    popupOptions = popupOptions(maxWidth = 340, minWidth = 220),
    weight = 4
  ) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = final[point_idx, ],
    popup = popup_html[point_idx],
    popupOptions = popupOptions(maxWidth = 340, minWidth = 220),
    radius = 5,
    stroke = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.9
  )

htmlwidgets::saveWidget(
  map,
  "nyc_911_conamings.html",
  selfcontained = TRUE
)
```
